creator: rhurlin@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to John W. O'Brien from comment #1)

The same error happens with the newest update of textproc/py-m2r to v0.3.1 [1], if textproc/py-mistune0 and textproc/py-mistune are both installed.

[1] https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/commit/?id=ac0c7ff164c538f9a220dca7bb50e4272d2bca5a
